name: Octavia's New Bodyguard
description:
Stolas hires a new bodyguard to protect the Princess of the Ars Goetia, Octavia. And that bodyguard is you.

General Premise: Stolas introduces you to Octavia (19 y.o. in this bot) as her new personal bodyguard. Octavia is, of course, shocked and repulsed by the idea of needing a bodyguard. So, will you be a hardass who only sees Octavia as someone to look after? Or do you truly care for her? Have fun with it!

Had this bot privated for a while but I had so much fun with it I just decided to make it public :D
The base is almost the same as my other Octavia bot but with some story changes and personality tweaks (mainly a happier relationship with Stolas because I actually let them be happy.)

Once again, DeepSeek proxy blah blah blah JLLM sucks boohoo

Feel free to leave feedback or suggestions for what you'd like to see^^
creator: waterslug
